{
  "key": "mobile_merchant_feature_flags",
  "channel": "MOBILE_MERCHANT",
  "is_reload_lang": false,
  "is_external_service": false,
  "service": null,
  "path": null,
  "method": null,
  "value": {
    "enable_biometric_login": true,
    "enable_new_onboarding": false,
    "enable_dark_mode": false,
    "enable_guest_checkout": false
  }
}

{
    "key": "mobile_merchant_auth_config",
    "channel": "MOBILE_MERCHANT",
    "is_reload_lang": false,
    "is_external_service": false,
    "service": null,
    "path": null,
    "method": null,
    "value": {
        "key": "auth",
        "channel": "MOBILE",
        "is_reload_lang": false,
        "is_external_service": false,
        "service": null,
        "path": null,
        "method": null,
        "value": {
            "providers": [
                "email",
                "telegram"
            ],
            "require_email_verification": true,
            "password_policy": {
                "min_length": 8,
                "require_uppercase": true,
                "require_number": true,
                "require_special_char": false
            }
        }
    }
}

{
    "code": "MCH001",
    "full_name": "Acme Trading Co.",
    "full_name_kh": "អាកមេ ត្រេឌីង",
    "email": "admin@acme.com",
    "phone": "+85512345678",
    "logo_url": "https://cdn.example.com/logo.png",
    "cover_image_url": "https://cdn.example.com/cover.png",
    "description": "Leading trading company in Cambodia",
    "description_kh": "ក្រុមហ៊ុនពាណិជ្ជកម្មឈានមុខគេនៅកម្ពុជា",
    "business_type": "LLC",
    "registration_number": "REG-2024-001",
    "tax_id": "TAX-001",
    "address": "123 Norodom Blvd",
    "city": "Phnom Penh",
    "state": "Phnom Penh",
    "postal_code": "12000",
    "country": "KH",
    "default_currency": "USD",
    "default_timezone": "Asia/Phnom_Penh",
    "default_language": "en"
  }

{
    "full_name": "Acme Trading Co. Ltd",
    "full_name_kh": "អាកមេ ត្រេឌីង លីមីតធីត",
    "phone": "+85598765432",
    "logo_url": "https://cdn.example.com/logo-new.png",
    "city": "Siem Reap",
    "default_currency": "USD",
    "default_language": "km"
  }

{
    "merchant_id": 1,
    "code": "STR001",
    "name": "Acme Main Branch",
    "name_kh": "អាកមេ សាខាចម្បង",
    "slug": "acme-main",
    "subdomain": "acme",
    "email": "main@acme.com",
    "phone": "+85512345678",
    "logo_url": "https://cdn.example.com/store-logo.png",
    "cover_image_url": "https://cdn.example.com/store-cover.png",
    "description": "Our flagship retail store",
    "description_kh": "ហាងលក់រាយចម្បងរបស់យើង",
    "address": "123 Norodom Blvd",
    "city": "Phnom Penh",
    "state": "Phnom Penh",
    "postal_code": "12000",
    "country": "KH",
    "latitude": 11.5564,
    "longitude": 104.9282,
    "store_type": "RETAIL",
    "business_hours": "{\"monday\":{\"open\":\"09:00\",\"close\":\"18:00\",\"is_closed\":false},\"tuesday\":{\"open\":\"09:00\",\"close\":\"18:00\",\"is_closed\":false},\"sunday\":{\"open\":\"10:00\",\"close\":\"16:00\",\"is_closed\":false}}",
    "meta_title": "Acme Main Branch - Best Retail Store in Phnom Penh",
    "meta_description": "Shop at Acme Main Branch for the best deals",
    "meta_keywords": "retail, phnom penh, acme"
  }

{
    "name": "Acme Main Branch (Updated)",
    "name_kh": "អាកមេ សាខាចម្បង (ថ្មី)",
    "phone": "+85598001234",
    "logo_url": "https://cdn.example.com/store-logo-v2.png",
    "cover_image_url": "https://cdn.example.com/store-cover-v2.png",
    "city": "Siem Reap",
    "latitude": 13.3671,
    "longitude": 103.8448,
    "meta_title": "Acme Siem Reap Branch"
  }

{
    "enable_e_menu": true,
    "enable_e_commerce": true,
    "enable_pos": false,
    "primary_color": "#1D9E75",
    "secondary_color": "#0F6E56",
    "font_family": "Kantumruy Pro",
    "show_images": true,
    "show_tags": true,
    "show_prices": true,
    "show_ratings": true,
    "show_stock_status": true,
    "allow_online_orders": true,
    "allow_delivery": true,
    "allow_pickup": true,
    "allow_dine_in": false,
    "allow_reservations": false,
    "min_order_amount": 5.00,
    "max_order_amount": 500.00,
    "accepted_payment_methods": "[\"CASH\",\"CARD\",\"MOBILE\"]",
    "currency_code": "USD",
    "supported_currencies": "[\"USD\",\"KHR\"]",
    "tax_rate": 10.00,
    "service_charge_rate": 5.00,
    "tax_inclusive": false,
    "notification_email": "orders@acme.com",
    "notification_phone": "+85512345678",
    "enable_order_notifications": true,
    "enable_low_stock_notifications": true,
    "seo_title": "Acme Main - Best Retail Store",
    "seo_description": "Shop the best products at Acme",
    "seo_keywords": "retail, cambodia, acme",
    "social_links": "{\"facebook\":\"https://fb.com/acme\",\"instagram\":\"https://instagram.com/acme\",\"twitter\":\"\"}"
  }
